name: Kartoffelpuree Meerrettich (Mashed Potatoes/Horseradish Crm)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and quarter the potatoes.
2. Cook them in boiling salted water in a medium-size saucepan until tender, then drain.
3. Mash the potatoes, adding 1 tablespoon butter and the freshly ground pepper.
4. Add the sour cream, horseradish, and minced parsley. Mix well to incorporate all ingredients.
5. Transfer the mashed potatoes to a serving bowl.
6. Top with 1 tablespoon melted butter before serving.
